series_metadata.series_description: Records contain Federal Tax Information (FTI ) safeguarding files, including copies of internal inspection reports, self inspection reports provided by counties, email correspondence, Plan of Action, Milestones (POAM), IRS Corrective Action Plans (CAP), Safeguarding Activity Reports (SAR), and Safeguarding Procedures Reports (SPR)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: in office superseded, obsolete, or replaced
